---
title: "First Essay"
date: 2026-06-03
description: "A first test essay for Otiose Ruminations."
categories: [mathematics, history]
---

This is the first test essay.

Here is a mathematical expression:

$$
\int_0^1 \log^2(1-x)\log^2(1+x)\,dx
$$

And here is a paragraph about history.

The point of this page is only to check that Quarto renders essays correctly.
